title: helichrysum indicum
intro: Helichrysum indicum, also known as the Indian curry plant or curry-herb, is a flowering plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Helichrysum indicum include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Helichrysum indicum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Helichrysum indicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, as well as being used as a culinary herb to add flavor to various dishes.
